title: CyberProof Executive Claim Dashboard
description: Cyber Insurance Evidence Assistant · Froth.ly · Latest indexed dashboard log · Executive dashboard with forensic timeline and evidence artifacts

options.query:
index=cyberproof earliest=0 latest=now
| head 1
| spath
| spath path=forensic_summary.affected_hosts{} output=AffectedHost
| eval AffectedHost=mvsort(mvdedup(AffectedHost))
| eval AffectedHosts=mvcount(AffectedHost)
| eval AffectedHostList=mvjoin(AffectedHost," · ")
| table AffectedHosts AffectedHostList

index=cyberproof earliest=0 latest=now
| head 1
| spath
| spath path=response.actions{} output=action
| mvexpand action
| spath input=action path=name output=Action
| spath input=action path=started output=StartedRaw
| spath input=action path=ended output=EndedRaw
| spath input=action path=status output=Status
| eval Started=strftime(strptime(StartedRaw,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%6N"),"%H:%M:%S")
| eval Ended=strftime(strptime(EndedRaw,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%6N"),"%H:%M:%S")
| eval DurationSec=round(strptime(EndedRaw,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%6N")-strptime(StartedRaw,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.%6N"),2)
| table Started Ended Action Status DurationSec

index=cyberproof earliest=0 latest=now
| head 1
| spath
| spath path=incident.attacker_ip output=AttackerIP
| table AttackerIP

index=cyberproof earliest=0 latest=now
| head 1
| spath
| spath path=regulatory_deadlines.nis2_early_warning output=NIS2Deadline
| spath path=regulatory_deadlines.insurance_notification output=InsuranceDeadline
| spath path=regulatory_deadlines.gdpr_article_33 output=GDPRDeadline
| eval Deadline=mvappend("NIS2 early warning 24h","Insurance notification 48h","GDPR Article 33 72h")
| eval DeadlineRaw=mvappend(NIS2Deadline,InsuranceDeadline,GDPRDeadline)
| eval row=mvzip(Deadline,DeadlineRaw,"||")
| mvexpand row
| eval Deadline=mvindex(split(row,"||"),0)
| eval DeadlineRaw=mvindex(split(row,"||"),1)
| eval DeadlineEpoch=strptime(DeadlineRaw,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%6N")
| eval RemainingSec=round(DeadlineEpoch-now(),0)
| eval AbsSec=abs(RemainingSec)
| eval Days=floor(AbsSec/86400)
| eval Hours=floor((AbsSec-(Days*86400))/3600)
| eval Minutes=floor((AbsSec-(Days*86400)-(Hours*3600))/60)
| eval Seconds=AbsSec-(Days*86400)-(Hours*3600)-(Minutes*60)
| eval Countdown=case(RemainingSec<0, printf("-%dd %02dh %02dm %02ds",Days,Hours,Minutes,Seconds), true(), printf("%dd %02dh %02dm %02ds",Days,Hours,Minutes,Seconds))
| eval Status=case(RemainingSec<0,"🔴 Exceeded", RemainingSec<=43200,"🟠 Due soon", true(),"🟢 OK")
| eval DeadlineTime=strftime(DeadlineEpoch,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
| table Deadline DeadlineTime Countdown Status

index=cyberproof earliest=0 latest=now
| head 1
| spath
| spath path=artifacts.prov_graph output=ProvGraph
| spath path=artifacts.enrichment output=Enrichment
| spath path=artifacts.evidence_sections_complete output=Sections
| spath path=artifacts.provenance_standard output=ProvenanceStandard
| spath path=incident.incident_type output=IncidentType
| spath path=artifacts.evidence_pdf output=EvidencePDF
| spath path=container_id output=ContainerID
| eval ProvGraph=mvindex(split(ProvGraph,"/"),-1)
| eval Enrichment=mvindex(split(Enrichment,"/"),-1)
| eval EvidencePDF=mvindex(split(EvidencePDF,"/"),-1)
| eval IncidentType=replace(IncidentType,"Web Application Exploit \+ Command and Control \+ Backdoor Installation","Web Exploit + C2 + Backdoor")
| eval Item=mvappend("Container ID","Provenance graph","MCP enrichment","Evidence package","Provenance standard","Chain of custody","Incident type","Report file")
| eval Value=mvappend(ContainerID,"✓ ".ProvGraph,"✓ ".Enrichment,"✓ ".Sections." sections",ProvenanceStandard." · PROV-JSON","✓ Splunk SOAR REST API",IncidentType,EvidencePDF)
| eval row=mvzip(Item,Value,"||")
| mvexpand row
| eval "Evidence item"=mvindex(split(row,"||"),0)
| eval Evidence=mvindex(split(row,"||"),1)
| table "Evidence item" Evidence

index=cyberproof earliest=0 latest=now
| head 1
| spath
| spath path=response.total_response_seconds output=ResponseSeconds
| spath path=financial_impact_usd.downtime output=Downtime
| spath path=financial_impact_usd.forensic output=Forensic
| spath path=financial_impact_usd.breach output=Breach
| spath path=financial_impact_usd.total output=Total
| eval ResponseSeconds=printf("%.2f", tonumber(ResponseSeconds))
| eval CostItem=mvappend("Inventory downtime (".ResponseSeconds."s)","Forensic investigation","Data breach notification","Total direct claim","NIS2 fine exposure (EUR)")
| eval Amount=mvappend("$".printf("%.2f", tonumber(Downtime)), "$".tostring(round(tonumber(Forensic),0),"commas"), "$".tostring(round(tonumber(Breach),0),"commas"), "$".tostring(round(tonumber(Total),0),"commas"), "up to €10,000,000")
| eval row=mvzip(CostItem,Amount,"||")
| mvexpand row
| eval "Cost item"=mvindex(split(row,"||"),0)
| eval Amount=mvindex(split(row,"||"),1)
| table "Cost item" Amount

index=cyberproof earliest=0 latest=now
| head 1
| spath
| spath path=response.total_response_seconds output=ResponseTime
| eval ResponseTime=round(tonumber(ResponseTime),2)
| table ResponseTime

index=cyberproof earliest=0 latest=now
| head 1
| spath
| spath path=financial_impact_usd.total output=TotalClaim
| eval TotalClaim=round(tonumber(TotalClaim),0)
| table TotalClaim
